mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_run (run_id, task_id, objective, status, steps_json, tool_calls_json, final_answer, created_at) VALUES (#{po.runId}, #{po.taskId}, #{po.objective}, #{po.status}, #{po.stepsJson}, #{po.toolCallsJson}, #{po.finalAnswer}, #{po.createdAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE task_id = VALUES(task_id), objective = VALUES(objective), status = VALUES(status), steps_json = VALUES(steps_json), tool_calls_json = VALUES(tool_calls_json), final_answer = VALUES(final_answer)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_run ORDER BY created_at DESC
